overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Skyrim) showing a walk along a stormy mountain trail at dusk. The player approaches a campsite with dead bodies and armed NPCs through heavy rain and mist.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a wet rocky mountain path during a storm. Dark clouds fill the sky as rain falls steadily. Ancient stone ruins are visible far in the distance to the left, while misty mountains line the horizon.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as the stone ruins grow larger on the left. A campsite with firelight becomes visible in the distance ahead. The terrain features more prominent rock formations and scattered pine trees on the right hillside.

segments.scene_description: The player arrives at a grim campsite where multiple dead bodies lie scattered on the ground. Two armored characters are present—one standing near a white-barked tree and another holding a torch. The scene is illuminated by the firelight against the stormy dusk backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a stormy mountain trail that leads from a desolate wilderness toward a grim, firelit campsite. It begins with a walk along a wet rocky path under a sky of dark clouds and steady rain, with ancient stone ruins and misty mountains visible in the far distance. As the camera moves forward, the ruins grow larger on the left while the terrain shifts to include prominent rock formations and scattered pine trees on the right hillside. The scene then opens up to reveal a flickering campfire ahead, drawing the viewer closer to the source of light. Finally, the camera arrives at the campsite to find multiple dead bodies scattered across the ground and two armored characters standing guard by a white-barked tree under the stormy dusk sky.
